<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Plugins; use Pest\Contracts\Plugins\HandlesArguments; /** * @internal */ final class Verbose implements HandlesArguments { use Concerns\HandleArguments; /** * The list of verbosity levels. */ private const array VERBOSITY_LEVELS = ['v', 'vv', 'vvv', 'q']; /** * {@inheritDoc} */ public function handleArguments(array $arguments): array { foreach (self::VERBOSITY_LEVELS as $level) { if ($this->hasArgument('-'.$level, $arguments)) { $arguments = $this->popArgument('-'.$level, $arguments); } } if ($this->hasArgument('--quiet', $arguments)) { return $this->popArgument('--quiet', $arguments); } return $arguments; } }
